reference: I AM HERE MUCH MORE OUT OF PEOPLE'S WAY THAN IN TOWN WHERE MY AUNT AND SUCH AS PRETEND AN INTEREST IN ME AND A POWER OVER ME DO SO PERSECUTE ME WITH THEIR GOOD NATURE AND TAKE IT SO ILL THAT THEY ARE NOT ACCEPTED AS I WOULD LIVE IN A HOLLOW TREE TO AVOID THEM
text: i am here much more out of people's way than in town where my aunt and such as pretend an interest in me and a power over me do so persecute me with their good-nature and take it so ill that they are not accepted as i would live in a hollow tree to avoid them
